title: Cold-RL — Offline RL for NGINX Eviction
summary_zh: 首個生產級 RL 驅逐演算法，整合至 NGINX。Dueling DQN 透過 ONNX sidecar 在嚴格 500µs timeout 內運作。命中率從 0.14 提升到 0.35（146% 提升），CPU 開銷 <2%。
summary_en: First production-grade RL eviction algorithm, integrated into NGINX. Dueling DQN operates within a strict 500us timeout via ONNX sidecar. Hit rate improves from 0.14 to 0.35 (146% increase), with CPU overhead <2%.
